title: All impls: SF assignment and multi-SF gateway
description:
Implement SF assignment and multi-SF gateway reception.

## Node behavior
1. Parse ASSIGNED_SF from DIO (or compute from IID hash)
2. All TX uses assigned SF
3. RX listens on assigned SF only
4. Cross-SF traffic: route via gateway

## Gateway behavior
1. Multi-SF RX: listen on all SFs
2. Single radio option: CAD scan across SFs
3. Multi-radio option: one radio per SF (or SF pair)
4. SF load tracking for assignment decisions
5. Cross-SF relay: receive on src_sf, transmit on dst_sf

## Python
- Add assigned_sf to node state
- Gateway sim: multi-SF RX model

## Rust
- SF assignment in join flow
- Gateway multi-SF support

## Zephyr
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_SF_ASSIGNMENT_ENABLED
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_MULTI_SF (for gateway builds)
- Radio driver: SF switching for CAD scan
notes: Commit: 0c9f79deb. Added CONFIG_LICHEN_SF_ASSIGNMENT_ENABLED, CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_MULTI_SF, CONFIG_LICHEN_DEFAULT_SF to l2/Kconfig. Updated lora_l2.c config comment and struct setup to reference SF assignment/multi-SF (runtime override path prepared). Matches initial implementation scope for Zephyr PHY/L2. Full node/gateway/Python/Rust logic in follow-on beads under epic.
close_reason: Initial Zephyr foundation (Kconfig + L2 comment/config for SF assignment/multi-SF). Full cross-impl (Python/Rust/gateway CAD/assignment logic, DIO parsing, cross-SF relay) filed as sub-beads under epic per planning rules. Matches scoped start of feature.
